core.name: Talia
core.backstory: Talia is the innkeeper of Oakmere, usually found at The Lantern Mug tavern. Known as warm, practical, gossipy, Talia has become tangled in the town's quiet conflict around Lord Vane's schemes. Privately, Talia carries a dangerous secret: Hides refugees in the cellar when patrols search the town.

dynamic.current_goal: Continue daily work as innkeeper while protecting this secret: Hides refugees in the cellar when patrols search the town
